meta.title: Kling 2.6 4K AI Video Generator | 4K/60fps Ultra HD | OpenCreator
meta.description: Experience Kling 2.6 4K with 4K/60fps output and custom voice library. The next evolution of Kuaishou's AI video generation. Join the waitlist on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Kling 2.6 4K brings cinema-quality output with 4K resolution at 60fps, plus a custom voice library for personalized audio. Coming Q1 2026 based on Kuaishou's official roadmap.

features.title: Expected Features
features.subtitle: Based on Kuaishou's Q1 2026 roadmap announcement

resolution.title: 4K Ultra HD Output
resolution.description: Generate videos at true 4K resolution (3840×2160) for cinema-quality production and large-screen display.

framerate.title: 60fps Smooth Motion
framerate.description: Double the frame rate for buttery-smooth motion, ideal for fast action, sports, and high-end commercials.

customVoice.title: Custom Voice Library
customVoice.description: Upload and clone voices to create personalized audio that matches your brand or character consistently.

audioSync.title: Enhanced Audio-Visual Sync
audioSync.description: Building on Kling 2.6's simultaneous audio-visual generation with even tighter lip-sync and sound coordination.

characterConsistency.title: Improved Character Consistency
characterConsistency.description: Better identity preservation across longer sequences and multi-shot productions.

promptFollowing.title: Advanced Prompt Understanding
promptFollowing.description: More nuanced interpretation of complex prompts, storylines, and creative directions.

gallery.title: Preview
gallery.subtitle: Representative examples from current Kling 2.6 Pro - expect even higher quality with 4K

cinematic.title: Cinematic Production
cinematic.useCase: Create broadcast-ready content with 4K resolution perfect for TV, cinema, and large displays.

commercial.title: Premium Commercials
commercial.useCase: Produce luxury brand ads and product showcases that demand the highest visual fidelity.

vr.title: VR/AR Content
vr.useCase: Generate high-resolution content suitable for virtual reality and immersive displays.

sports.title: Sports & Action
sports.useCase: Capture fast movement with crystal-clear 60fps for sports, dance, and action sequences.

documentary.title: Documentary
documentary.useCase: Create documentary-style content with cinematic quality and custom narration voices.

branding.title: Brand Content
branding.useCase: Build consistent brand identity with cloned voice libraries for all your video content.

specs.subtitle: Based on official roadmap - final specs may vary

pricing.description: 4K/60fps video generation with custom voice library
pricing.note: Based on Kuaishou's official roadmap. Final pricing and availability will be confirmed upon release.

0.question: When will Kling 2.6 4K be available?
0.answer: According to Kuaishou's official roadmap announced in December 2025, Kling 2.6 4K with 4K/60fps output and custom voice library is planned for Q1 2026.

1.question: What new features will Kling 2.6 4K include?
1.answer: The main upgrades are 4K resolution (3840×2160), 60fps frame rate for smoother motion, and a custom voice library for voice cloning and personalized audio.

2.question: Will it be compatible with current Kling 2.6 workflows?
2.answer: While not confirmed, Kuaishou typically maintains backward compatibility. Existing workflows should work with the option to enable 4K/60fps output.

3.question: How much will Kling 2.6 4K cost?
3.answer: Pricing has not been announced. Given the higher output quality, expect pricing to be higher than current Kling 2.6 Pro rates. We'll update this page when official pricing is released.

4.question: What is the custom voice library feature?
4.answer: The custom voice library will allow you to upload voice samples to create cloned voices for use across your video generations, enabling consistent brand voices and character identities.

5.question: How can I get notified when it launches?
5.answer: Bookmark this page and follow OpenCreator for updates. We'll announce availability as soon as Kuaishou releases the 4K version.
